paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.05, representing a 2.02% increase from the prior close, but a 36.32% decrease over the last 20 trading sessions.

Recent news headlines have focused on the company's governance and financing, including the completion of a $375 million convertible senior notes offering and the resignation of director Miles Everson due to governance concerns.

There have been several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K filing on July 15 detailing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and another 8-K filing on July 13 disclosing Everson's resignation. There has been one Form 4 filing in the feed, but no Form 144 filings.
